title: Protection of natural persons in data processing and free movement within the EU.
requirement: Lay down rules for protection and free movement regarding the processing of personal data.

title: Notification of Data Rectification, Erasure or Processing Restriction
trigger: processing personal data with rectification, erasure, or restriction requirements
requirement: The controller must communicate any rectification of personal data to each recipient unless impossible or disproportionate.

title: Notification of Data Erasure or Processing Restriction to Recipients and Subjects
trigger: processing personal data with erasure, restriction requirements
requirement: The controller must communicate any erasure of personal data or processing restrictions to each recipient unless impossible or disproportionate.

title: Notification of Data Rectification or Erasure to Subjects upon Request
trigger: subject requests rectification, erasure information after processing personal data with restrictions
requirement: The controller must inform the subject about recipients of their disclosed personal data if they request it.

title: Recognition of Judgments and Decisions Requiring Data Transfer or Disclosure
requirement: A judgment recognised in the Union shall not be enforceable if it requires a controller to transfer personal data without an international agreement.
evidence_required: recognition of judgement by EU court

title: Enforceability of Decisions Requiring Data Transfer or Disclosure from Third Countries
trigger: decision requiring data transfer by third country authority
requirement: A decision recognised in the Union shall not be enforceable if it requires a controller to disclose personal data without an international agreement.
evidence_required: recognition of administrative authority's decision by EU court
